user.title: Yandex Station Relay AI
user.description: Bridge a Yandex Dialogs skill to an AI agent. The skill's activation name becomes your trigger word (e.g. «Алиса, попроси Кузю …»).

data_description.name: Friendly name for this relay (and the webhook).
data_description.skill_id: If set, only requests from this Yandex skill_id are accepted. Find it in the Dialogs console URL or request payload.

finish.title: Webhook ready
finish.description:
Paste this URL into your Yandex Dialogs skill as the webhook (Backend → Webhook URL):

`{url}`

Then set the skill's activation name to your trigger word (e.g. «Кузя»). After saving, open the integration's **Configure** screen to pick the AI backend.

init.title: Relay settings
init.description: Choose the AI backend and tune how Alice replies. Conversation-agent fields and OpenAI-compatible fields are both shown — fill in the ones for your selected backend.

data.end_session: End the dialog after each answer

data_description.conversation_agent: Conversation backend only. Leave blank for the default Assist agent, or enter an agent_id.
data_description.language: Conversation backend only. Language passed to the conversation agent (e.g. ru-RU).
data_description.api_base_url: OpenAI-compatible backend only. e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1 or a local server / OpenRouter.
data_description.api_key: OpenAI-compatible backend only. Sent as a Bearer token. Leave blank for local servers that need none.
data_description.system_prompt: OpenAI-compatible backend only. Steer Кузя's persona and keep replies short and speakable.
data_description.trigger_phrases: Comma/space separated leading words stripped from the recognised phrase (e.g. кузя, кузю). Connector words like «попроси» are always stripped.
data_description.tts_entity: Optional. When the AI is slower than the ~3s Yandex limit, the full answer is spoken here. Leave empty to instead reply «думаю…» and let the user say «дальше».
data_description.first_turn_timeout: How long to wait for the AI before falling back to the thinking reply. Keep under ~3s.
data_description.end_session: If on, Alice closes the dialog after answering (no follow-up turns).
